DrumScript 0 0
Edit this page
  1. DrumScript /
  2. Runbook 0001: Create Backing Track
View Source Open in ChatGPT Open in Claude

Runbook 0001: Create Backing Track¶

    """
    import drumscript as ds
    from IPython.display import Audio


    # 1. Define the relative path to the audio file
    input_track = "audio/synth_pop.mp3"

    # 2. Extract stems (DrumScript will save the outputs to a new 'stems_output' folder right next to the notebook)
    output_files = ds.extract_stems(
        audio_path=input_track,
        output_dir="stems_output",
        output_format="mp3",
        drumless=True 
    )

    # 3. Create the in-browser playable widget for the original track
    print("Original Track:")
    display(Audio(input_track))

    # 4. Create the in-browser playable widget for the drumless track
    print("Drumless Backing Track:")
    display(Audio(output_files['drumless']))
    """

import drumscript as ds
from IPython.display import Audio

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

date/time: 2026-05-13 20:38:39.783162

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

date/time: 2026-05-13 20:38:39.797095

# 1. Define the relative path to the audio file
input_track = "audiowav"

# 2. Extract stems (DrumScript will save the outputs to a new 'stems_output' folder right next to the notebook)
output_files = ds.extract_stems(
    audio_path=input_track,
    drumless=True,
    full=True
)
